SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.config.server

Class AdaptiveRateConfig

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.config.server.AdaptiveRateConfig
public class AdaptiveRateConfig extends Object
Configuration for adaptive rate limiting.

Adaptive rate limiting automatically tightens per-IP and rate-window limits when the server is under load, based on the ratio of active to maximum connections.

This configuration lives inline inside server.json5 under the adaptiveRate key.

    • map

  • Constructor Details

    • AdaptiveRateConfig

      public AdaptiveRateConfig(Map<String,Object> map)
      Constructs a new AdaptiveRateConfig instance.
      Parameters:
      map - Configuration map.

  • Method Details

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Check if adaptive rate limiting is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if adaptive rate limiting is enabled, false otherwise.

    • getHighThreshold

      public double getHighThreshold()
      Gets the high-load threshold above which limits are tightened.

      Expressed as a fraction (0.0–1.0) of total active vs. maximum connections.

      Returns:
      High-load threshold (default: 0.8).

    • getLowThreshold

      public double getLowThreshold()
      Gets the low-load threshold below which normal limits are restored.

      Expressed as a fraction (0.0–1.0) of total active vs. maximum connections.

      Returns:
      Low-load threshold (default: 0.3).

    • getReductionFactor

      public double getReductionFactor()
      Gets the reduction factor applied to connection limits under high load.

      A value of 0.5 halves the effective limits when the server is overloaded.

      Returns:
      Reduction factor (default: 0.5).
